title: Create Character Counter or Specific Error Message for short-text Name field on Workform
excerpt: We have run into an issue with the Name field on our Workform where the character limit is 255. However, the field does not stop you from going over this amount or provide you a character count generally so end-users are…

posts.author: mowbrayian (Ian Mowbray)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have run into an issue with the Name field on our Workform where the character limit is 255. However, the field does not stop you from going over this amount or provide you a character count generally so end-users are not aware when they go over.

The error message just states “Submission failed. Please try again.” so it is nondescript.

It would be great to either have the field stop at 255 characters. Alternatively, adding a character counter or just providing a more specific error message would work as well. Since this is a standard system field, we cannot even adapt it to be a larger text area field.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

You don’t need to have anything mapped to the Name column for your forms, and it will just say 'Incoming Form Response". Then you can use the Long Text Column as a replacement.

I don’t think there is an AI option to rename the item based on the details of another column… yet. But I might be wrong.

posts.author: johnstockett (John Stockett)
posts.cookedHtml: General Caster provides a recipe/formula to rename the item name… and it works awesome. (Too bad this isn’t native to Monday. Also too bad that I haven’t found a way to rename subitems yet.)
